prompt: Goal: Create a colorful pixel-art promotional illustration showing a selfie transformed into comic avatars. Canvas: 1200×675 widescreen 16:9 composition, bright retro game aesthetic, crisp blocky pixels, thick black outlines, halftone comic dots, high contrast, playful creator-studio mood. Main subject: A young man with messy dark curly hair, wearing a dark hoodie under an olive green jacket; keep him recognizable as the same person across all depictions, but render the face as a simple soft blurred placeholder with warm skin tone and no detailed features. Layout: On the left, show exactly 1 large desktop photo window with rounded corners and three small traffic-light buttons at the top, containing a realistic selfie of the person. In the center-right foreground, show exactly 1 large transformed pixel-comic portrait of the same person, cropped from chest up, with a bold white sticker-like outline. Between the photo window and the pixel portrait, place exactly 1 thick white arrow pointing right to indicate conversion. Around the central portrait, include exactly 4 smaller comic avatar outputs: 1 yellow-background portrait near the top center, 1 green-background speech-bubble comic portrait in the upper right, 1 blue-background dramatic comic portrait in the lower right, and 1 mint-green portrait displayed on a drawing tablet at the bottom left. Environment: A cozy digital artist desk and studio with dark teal walls, shelves, pixel collectibles, and warm lighting. Desk objects: include exactly 1 angled drawing tablet with color swatches on the right edge, exactly 1 stylus lying in front of it, exactly 1 red mug with a white heart and steam, exactly 1 black desk lamp glowing from the left, exactly 1 potted plant on the desk, exactly 3 small pixel figurines along the bottom left edge, exactly 1 framed pixel heart on the back wall, exactly 1 tiny pixel person figurine on the top shelf, and exactly 1 small potted plant on the shelf. Background: Use a teal, coral, peach, and yellow radial comic burst behind the main character with halftone texture, small plus signs, sparkle icons, and square pixels. Text: No readable headline or labels. Visual style: blend pixel art, manga/webtoon/comic transformation, retro arcade UI, social-media promo thumbnail, clean composition, sharp edges, vibrant colors. Constraints: Use exactly the counted major panels and desk objects listed; do not add extra characters, captions, watermarks, logos, or UI text.
